bead.title: fix: restore Rust formatting gate
bead.description:
Context: HELIX TP-001 says the test suite is the authority and CI must block regressions. Current gap assessment found `cargo fmt --all -- --check` failing after recent worker changes, which blocks autonomous proof before deeper feature work.

In-scope files: Rust source files reported by `cargo fmt --all -- --check`; no semantic changes.
Out-of-scope: feature implementation, test logic changes, formatting non-Rust files unless directly required by the command.
Implementation hint: run `cargo fmt --all`, inspect the diff for accidental semantic churn, and keep the commit formatting-only.
bead.acceptance:
1. `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes.
2. `git diff --check` passes.
3. The commit changes only formatting or mechanically equivalent import/order whitespace.
